title: NID DAT Counselling 2026

detail.title: NID DAT Counselling 2026
detail.short_info: NID DAT Counselling 2026 schedule is out. MDes Round 1 provisional offer letter released on May 21, 2026. BDes counselling registration starts after result on or before May 28, 2026. Check full details and download links here.

content.text: The National Institute of Design (NID) has officially released the NID DAT Counselling 2026 schedule for design aspirants. Candidates taking part in the admission process can check the complete timeline on the official website -admissions.nid.edu. The institute has also released the provisional offer letters for Master of Design (MDes) Round 1 counselling on May 21, 2026.

For undergraduate admissions, the NID DAT BDes Mains Result 2026 will be announced on or before May 28, 2026. Once the results are declared, the counselling registration for shortlisted Bachelor of Design (BDes) candidates will begin immediately and continue until May 31, 2026.

During this period, candidates are required to upload important documents such as educational certificates, birth certificate, and valid photo ID proof. The last date to submit all documents is May 31, 2026.

sections.heading: How to Download NID DAT 2026 Provisional Offer Letter

items: Click on the “Provisional Offer Letter” link
Login using your credentials (Application Number and Date of Birth)
Download and print the provisional offer letter for future reference.

sections.heading: Important Dates for NID DAT Counselling 2026

content.text: The counselling process includes registration, document verification, seat allotment, and admission confirmation. Shortlisted candidates must complete the online registration and upload required documents within the given timeline.

sections.heading: What to Do After Receiving Provisional Offer Letter

items: Accept or decline the offer within the stipulated time.
Pay the admission fee to confirm the seat.
Prepare for document verification during subsequent rounds.

content.text: Candidates should regularly check the official website for updates on further rounds.
